name: BEN_INTEGRATION_KEY_MAP
description:
BEN_INTEGRATION_KEY_MAP stores 
the alternate Key Map definitions for benefits objects.

columns.Name: OBJECT_NAME
columns.Comments: Type of the object

columns.Name: BASE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the object

columns.Name: SURROGATE_ID
columns.Comments: surrogate key of the object

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: This column will store the Enterprise ID.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_1
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_2
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_3
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_4
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_5
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_1
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_2
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_3
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_4
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_5
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_1
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_2
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_3
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_4
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_5
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
